post.description: Call this right after Firebase login. Creates the user if first time, returns existing user otherwise. Check `isNewUser` to decide whether to show onboarding.

get.description: Returns the User record with the nested UserProfile.

put.description: Updates name, gender, and date of birth. All fields optional — send only what changed.
Updates height (cm) and weight (kg). Used during onboarding and settings.

get.description: `hasProfile` = name/gender filled. `hasPhysicalData` = height/weight filled. `onboardingCompleted` is set to true only after user explicitly completes the flow.

post.description: Links a device by serial number to the current user. If the device was previously paired by this user, it re-pairs it.

409.description: Device already paired to another user

get.description: Returns the most recently paired device. Returns 404 if no device is paired.

patch.description: Partially update device configuration. Send only the fields you want to change.

post.description: Update battery state, battery percentage and firmware version from device. Sets syncStatus to SYNCED.

get.description: Lightweight status check — battery level, charge state, sync state, firmware.
get.summary: Get device battery and sync status

delete.description: Removes the device record. The device can be re-paired later with the serial number.

post.description: Returns a session with an `id`. Store this `id` to call `sessions/end` and `data/batch` later.
Closes the session by setting `endTime` and summary stats. Call this when the user stops wearing the device.
Send multiple sensor readings at once. Recommended: batch every 60 readings (~1 min of data at 1 Hz). Returns count of rows saved.

**No request body needed.** Call this while the user is sitting/standing in their natural upright position. The returned reference axis values define what "upright" means for this user. Store these values on the device to use as the baseline for future posture detection.

get.description: Returns sessions newest-first. Use `page` and `limit` query params to paginate.
Returns the session + computed stats (upright %, score, duration).
get.summary: Get detailed stats for a session

get.description: Averages `averageScore` across all completed sessions today. Returns `score: null` with a message if no sessions completed yet today.
Returns the goals set for today. If no custom goals are set, returns system defaults (30 min exercise, 8h upright, 1h device). Check `isDefault: true` for this case.

put.description: Creates or replaces the goals for today. Send only the fields you want to change.

get.description: Returns how much the user actually exercised, was upright, and used the device today. Combine with GET /api/goals/daily to show progress bars.
Returns aggregated stats and daily breakdown for the chosen period. Use `dailyData` to draw charts.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period to aggregate. Defaults to "week".

get.summary: Get analytics summary for a time period

get.description: Returns how many consecutive days the user has been active.

post.description:
**Conversation flow:**

1. First message: do NOT send `conversationId` → a new conversation is created.
2. Follow-up messages: send the `conversationId` returned from the previous response to continue the same conversation.

_Note: Currently returns mock responses. OpenAI integration coming soon._
post.summary: Send a message to the AI coach

get.description: Returns conversations with the last message included for preview.
Returns messages in chronological order (oldest first).
get.summary: Get full message history for a conversation

info.title: Straight API
info.description: Backend API for the Straight posture correction mobile app. All endpoints except /api/users/sync require a Firebase Bearer token.

isNewUser.description: true if this is the first time the user logged in

inserted.description: Number of sensor data rows saved

referenceAxisX.description: Reference X-axis value at neutral posture

referenceAxisY.description: Reference Y-axis value at neutral posture

referenceAxisZ.description: Reference Z-axis value at neutral posture

score.description: Today's average score 0–100, null if no sessions yet

uprightTimeMinutes.description: Upright time goal in minutes (8 hours)

isDefault.description: true when no custom goal set today — showing system defaults

averageScore.description: Average posture score, null if no sessions

content.example: Great question! To improve your posture while sitting, keep your feet flat on the floor.

conversationId.description: Use this ID for follow-up messages

content.example: How can I improve my posture?
How can I improve my posture while sitting?
